{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Whatsapp & Social Media Sales Representative",
  "description": "House of Born2fro is a company that specializes in Plant powered care for All African Hair types and styles. we produce a diverse range of Hair treatments and repair products from Shampoos to sprays, conditioner &amp; so much more. We are an Ecommerce first business with footprints in South Africa, Kenya and Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Whatsapp &amp; Social Media Sales Representative

Job Location: Hybrid - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;

Description


	We are recruiting for the role of a social media Sales Representative (Hybrid Role)
	The Sales Representative serves as the first point of contact for customers making enquiries through WhatsApp, Instagram DM(s), Facebook Messages and other Social Media Channels&nbsp;
	Our social media sales rep(s) are expected to demonstrate a general authority about Hair care in general before proceeding to sell the product benefits.&nbsp;
	They are also expected to Suggest the right products by explaining the science and sharing reviews. A key performance indicator will be measured by how many enquiries are converted into purchasing customers&nbsp;


Responsibilities
Customer Sales &amp; Product Recommendations:


	Build trust with customers by giving smart answers to their problems and Hair related questions.Demonstrate Hair authority and Knowledge to make them feel comfortable on our platform
	Understand customer needs through effective questioning
	Recommend suitable products based on hair type, hairstyle, concerns, and customer goals
	Explain product benefits, usage and expected results clearly and accurately
	Guide customers through the purchasing process; upsell and cross-sell relevant products where appropriate
	Label and organize customer conversations appropriately


Customer Service &amp; Order Support:


	Assist customers with order placement and payment processes
	Follow up on pending enquiries and dormant customers
	Support purchasing customers by following up on their shipment and updating them on the delivery status&nbsp;


Performance Expectations


	Achieve response time targets
	Meet sales conversion goals
	Follow established sales and customer service procedures
	Maintain high levels of customer satisfaction


Working Arrangement:


	The role operates on a rotating five-day work schedule (Shift A) Monday to Friday and (Shift B) Wednesday to Sunday
	This rotation means the successful candidate will work some weekends and have alternate weekends off.
	Working hours are 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM with a break period of two hours per day
	The representative is expected to remain available, responsive, and actively engaged during scheduled working hours
	This is a hybrid role, mostly remote; but occasionally, you may be required to come into the office especially for training session.


Note
Final Recruitment will be based on product knowledge:


	Shortlisted candidates will be trained on General Hair care and the House of Born2fro product range. At the end of the study and training session, they are expected to develop a strong understanding of:
	Basic hair care education and customer guidance
	Different African hair types and styles
	Common hair concerns and challenges
	Product ingredients and benefits The role of each product within a healthy hair care routine
	Recommended product combinations and treatment routines


Benefits


	Salary: N150,000 Monthly.
	Monthly Data would be provided.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@born2fro.com using the Job Positionas the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-12",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Whatsapp & Social Media Sales Representative Job at House of Born2fro




        
    

        
        House of Born2fro is a company that specializes in Plant powered care for All African Hair types and styles. we produce a diverse range of Hair treatments and repair products from Shampoos to sprays, conditioner & so much more. We are an Ecommerce first business with footprints in South Africa, Kenya and Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Whatsapp & Social Media Sales Representative

Job Location: Hybrid - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time 

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are recruiting for the role of a social media Sales Representative (Hybrid Role)
	The Sales Representative serves as the first point of contact for customers making enquiries through WhatsApp, Instagram DM(s), Facebook Messages and other Social Media Channels 
	Our social media sales rep(s) are expected to demonstrate a general authority about Hair care in general before proceeding to sell the product benefits. 
	They are also expected to Suggest the right products by explaining the science and sharing reviews. A key performance indicator will be measured by how many enquiries are converted into purchasing customers 


Responsibilities
Customer Sales & Product Recommendations:


	Build trust with customers by giving smart answers to their problems and Hair related questions.Demonstrate Hair authority and Knowledge to make them feel comfortable on our platform
	Understand customer needs through effective questioning
	Recommend suitable products based on hair type, hairstyle, concerns, and customer goals
	Explain product benefits, usage and expected results clearly and accurately
	Guide customers through the purchasing process; upsell and cross-sell relevant products where appropriate
	Label and organize customer conversations appropriately


Customer Service & Order Support:


	Assist customers with order placement and payment processes
	Follow up on pending enquiries and dormant customers
	Support purchasing customers by following up on their shipment and updating them on the delivery status 


Performance Expectations


	Achieve response time targets
	Meet sales conversion goals
	Follow established sales and customer service procedures
	Maintain high levels of customer satisfaction


Working Arrangement:


	The role operates on a rotating five-day work schedule (Shift A) Monday to Friday and (Shift B) Wednesday to Sunday
	This rotation means the successful candidate will work some weekends and have alternate weekends off.
	Working hours are 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM with a break period of two hours per day
	The representative is expected to remain available, responsive, and actively engaged during scheduled working hours
	This is a hybrid role, mostly remote; but occasionally, you may be required to come into the office especially for training session.


Note
Final Recruitment will be based on product knowledge:


	Shortlisted candidates will be trained on General Hair care and the House of Born2fro product range. At the end of the study and training session, they are expected to develop a strong understanding of:
	Basic hair care education and customer guidance
	Different African hair types and styles
	Common hair concerns and challenges
	Product ingredients and benefits The role of each product within a healthy hair care routine
	Recommended product combinations and treatment routines


Benefits


	Salary: N150,000 Monthly.
	Monthly Data would be provided.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Positionas the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing Manager",
  "description": "DynamicPlus Advisory is a professional consultancy that provides strategic and cost effective business solutions to start-ups as well as small and medium sized businesses by Studying their businesses, understanding their individual needs, and providing them with the necessary customized solutions to their Human Resources needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Study Abroad / International Education

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Digital Marketing Manager to lead and execute our digital marketing strategies.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving online visibility, lead generation, customer engagement, and revenue growth through effective digital marketing campaigns.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement comprehensive digital marketing strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, and other digital platforms.
	Plan and execute SEO, SEM, email marketing, and content marketing initiatives.
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance, providing actionable insights and recommendations.
	Manage the company&#39;s website and ensure optimal user experience and conversion rates.
	Create and oversee digital content strategies to increase brand awareness and engagement.
	Track marketing budgets and ensure efficient allocation of resources.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure consistent brand messaging across all channels.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s or Master&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar Digital Marketing role.
	Professional marketing certifications will be an added advantage.
	Proven experience managing successful digital marketing campaigns.
	Strong knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Ads, SEO, SEM, and social media advertising.
	Excellent communication, analytical, and project management skills.
	Ability to interpret data and make data-driven decisions.


Skills Required:


	Digital Marketing Strategy
	Google Ads &amp; Analytics
	SEO &amp; SEM
	Social Media Marketing
	Content Marketing
	Email Marketing
	Data Analysis &amp; Reporting
	Lead Generation
	Budget Management
	Marketing Automation Tools.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: cvs@dynamicplusservices@gmail.com using &quot;Digital Marketing Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Digital Marketing Manager Job at DynamicPlus Advisory




        
    

        
        DynamicPlus Advisory is a professional consultancy that provides strategic and cost effective business solutions to start-ups as well as small and medium sized businesses by Studying their businesses, understanding their individual needs, and providing them with the necessary customized solutions to their Human Resources needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Study Abroad / International Education

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Digital Marketing Manager to lead and execute our digital marketing strategies.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving online visibility, lead generation, customer engagement, and revenue growth through effective digital marketing campaigns.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement comprehensive digital marketing strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn, and other digital platforms.
	Plan and execute SEO, SEM, email marketing, and content marketing initiatives.
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance, providing actionable insights and recommendations.
	Manage the company's website and ensure optimal user experience and conversion rates.
	Create and oversee digital content strategies to increase brand awareness and engagement.
	Track marketing budgets and ensure efficient allocation of resources.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure consistent brand messaging across all channels.


Requirements


	Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar Digital Marketing role.
	Professional marketing certifications will be an added advantage.
	Proven experience managing successful digital marketing campaigns.
	Strong knowledge of Google Analytics, Google Ads, SEO, SEM, and social media advertising.
	Excellent communication, analytical, and project management skills.
	Ability to interpret data and make data-driven decisions.


Skills Required:


	Digital Marketing Strategy
	Google Ads & Analytics
	SEO & SEM
	Social Media Marketing
	Content Marketing
	Email Marketing
	Data Analysis & Reporting
	Lead Generation
	Budget Management
	Marketing Automation Tools.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: cvs@[email protected] using "Digital Marketing Manager" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

        Humanify 360 Consulting s a strategic HR partner that helps organisations unlock the full potential of theirworkforce. We provide holistic solutions in talent acquisition and management, organisational development, and HR &business process automation to build resilient, efficient, and future-ready companies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Locations: Kado, Abuja (FCT) 
Resumption: Immediate
Slot: 2 Openings

Requirements


	Candidates should possess minimum of a University Degree.


Salary
N250,000 / month.

title: Job Openings at Sage Grey Finance Limited
content:
Sage Grey Finance Limited (“Sage Grey Finance” or “the Company”) is a finance services company incorporated in Nigeria. We are licensed and regulated by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) and are integrated into the Nigerian Interbank Settlement System (NIBSS). We are members of the Finance Houses Association of Nigeria (FHAN). We offer Lending Services (Project Finance, Asset Finance, Corporate finance, Consumer Loan, etc.), Fund Management Services, Advisory Services, and other services as authorized by the Central Bank of Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.)  Business Development Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	To strengthen its deal origination pipeline and expand its market presence, Sage Grey Finance Limited seeks to engage a Business Development Manager (“BDM”) responsible for identifying, developing, and securing viable transactions, projects, and strategic business opportunities for the company.
	The primary purpose of the role is to originate bankable transactions and projects, develop strategic relationships with clients and stakeholders, expand the company’s deal pipeline and support revenue growth through successful business acquisition and transaction execution.


Key Responsibilities
The Business Development Manager shall be responsible for, but not limited to the following:
Deal Origination & Business Development:


	Identify and originate viable transactions and projects for the company.
	Source opportunities across sectors including infrastructure, energy, manufacturing, oil & gas, telecoms, technology, real estate, agribusiness, financial services, and other strategic sectors.
	Develop and maintain a strong pipeline of prospective clients, projects, and transactions.
	Initiate and maintain relationships with corporates, project sponsors, financial institutions, investors, government agencies, DFIs, and strategic partners.
	Lead business development initiatives aimed at increasing transaction volumes and company revenue.
	Identify opportunities for financial advisory, capital raising, project finance, debt syndication, mergers & acquisitions and related mandates.


Client Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain long-term relationships with clients and stakeholders.
	Conduct meetings, presentations and negotiations with prospective and existing clients.
	Serve as the primary relationship contact for assigned clients and opportunities.
	Maintain regular engagement with key market participants and industry stakeholders.


Market Intelligence & Strategy:


	Monitor market trends, sector developments and emerging investment opportunities.
	Provide strategic recommendations to management on market positioning and business expansion.
	Maintain awareness of regulatory, financial and economic developments relevant to the company’s operations


Partnerships & Network Development:


	Develop strategic alliances with banks, investors, DFIs, private equity firms, law firms, consultants and industry operators.
	Represent the company at industry events, conferences, networking sessions and business forums.
	Promote the company’s brand and service offerings within the market.


Reporting & Performance Management:


	Prepare periodic business development reports and pipeline updates.
	Maintain accurate records of leads, prospects, meetings and transaction status.
	Track and report on business development targets and KPIs.
	Provide daily, weekly, monthly and quarterly reports to management on activities and achievements.


Qualifications and Experience


	A minimum of a Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, Accounting, Banking & Finance or related disciplines.
	Minimum of 5–8 years of relevant experience in business development, investment banking, corporate finance, financial advisory, project finance or related fields.
	Strong network within corporate, banking, investment and business communities.
	Strong understanding of financial markets, project finance and advisory services
	Demonstrated experience in transaction origination and client relationship management.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong commercial acumen and ability to identify business opportunities.
	Ability to work independently and deliver under pressure.


Application Closing Date: 19th June, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.


2.) Relationship Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Relationship Officer for Digital Products supports the Company’s digital business by assisting with customer onboarding, documentation, and reporting across lending and deposit products.
	The role focuses on helping originate and process digital loan and deposit applications, ensuring accurate customer records, and preparing regular reports on pipeline activities and product performance.
	By focusing on operational execution and customer engagement support, the position contributes to the growth of the Company’s digital lending and deposit business while enhancing acquisition efficiency, conversion, and overall customer experience.


Responsibilities
Digital Products (Lending):


	Support digital lead generation, customer acquisition, and onboarding activities across the Company’s digital lending products.
	Assist prospective and existing customers through the loan application and onboarding process by providing guidance on product requirements, documentation, and submission procedures.
	Follow up on client enquiries and ensure prompt responses to digital loan requests.
	Maintain an updated loan pipeline tracker with status of prospects, applications, and conversions.
	Assist in preparing draft loan proposals, quotations, and supporting documents.
	Monitor repayment behavior and escalate potential risks to senior Relationship Managers.
	Prepare weekly reports on loan acquisition activities and pipeline progress.


Digital Products (Deposits & Investment):


	Support customer acquisition and onboarding activities for the Company’s digital savings, investment, and deposit products across retail and SME segments.
	Assist customers with account opening, KYC documentation, product activation, and general onboarding processes.
	Maintain a deposit tracker to monitor inflows, customer activity, and product usage.
	Follow up on deposit enquiries and ensure timely responses to customer requests.
	Prepare weekly and monthly reports on deposit mobilization and customer engagement.
	Identify opportunities to cross-sell savings, cards, overdrafts, and bundled offerings to digital customers.
	Track customer engagement trends and highlight service gaps for improvement.


Documentation & Compliance:


	Ensure customer and transaction records are complete, accurate, and compliant with internal credit policies and regulatory guidelines.
	Collaborate with Legal, Compliance, and Risk teams to ensure full KYC/AML checks and policy adherence.
	Prepare periodic portfolio performance reports and analysis for management review.
	Stay abreast of regulatory developments, macroeconomic shifts, and industry best practices in credit analysis.


Stakeholder Management & Collaboration:


	Participate in team meetings, training sessions, and customer outreach activities.
	Support digital marketing initiatives and customer onboarding strategies.
	Assist in preparing presentations and conducting meetings with clients regarding digital products.
	Maintain an updated client database and business opportunity tracker.
	Provide regular updates and reports on portfolio performance and customer insights.
	Support initiatives aimed at improving customer experience and digital service offerings.
	Stay informed on emerging trends in digital banking and report opportunities to management.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related discipline.
	2–4 years of experience in digital banking, credit sales or business development within a financial institution.
	Working knowledge of electronic banking products, digital lending platforms, and credit processes.
	Basic understanding of financial analysis, customer relationship management, and sales techniques.
	Familiarity with lending and deposit products within the Nigerian financial services industry


Application Closing Date: 18th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 



3.) Fund Transfer Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Fund Transfer Officer is responsible for driving operational integrity and settlement excellence for Sage Grey Finance Limited by accurately executing, monitoring, and reconciling local and international fund transfers, payment instructions, and liquidity movements across the company's banking and transaction ecosystem.
	The role focuses on consultative payment operations, risk-controlled execution, compliance adherence, and service reliability across internal finance teams and external banking partners.
	The role goes beyond routine payment processing and requires the ability to understand transaction structures, coordinate seamlessly with treasury and compliance teams, and position Sage Grey Finance Limited as a reliable, secure, and operationally disciplined organization in every settlement interaction.
	The ideal candidate will have prior exposure to payment operations, treasury processing, or banking operations environments, with a strong understanding of SWIFT messaging, AML/CFT screening protocols, and an established ability to manage high-volume, time-critical fund transfers accurately to enhance the company's transaction execution credibility and stakeholder trust.


Key Responsibilities
The Fund Transfer Officer shall be responsible for, but not limited to, the following:
Fund Transfer Execution & Settlement:


	Process daily domestic and cross-border fund transfers including SWIFT MT103/MT202, local ACH, real-time payment systems, and online banking platforms.
	Verify payment instructions against supporting documentation (invoices, disbursement memos, facility letters, or client authorizations) before submission.
	Ensure all transfers comply with prescribed approval workflows, value dating rules, and available balance checks.
	Monitor outgoing and incoming payments, flagging delays, rejections, or discrepancies to the supervisor.
	Maintain accurate records of all transfer instructions, approvals, and transaction references.


Compliance & AML/CFT Checks:


	Screen all fund transfer instructions against internal watchlists, sanctions lists, and prohibited entity registers before processing.
	Escalate any suspicious, mismatched, or high-risk transactions to the Compliance Officer or Team Lead immediately.
	Ensure beneficiary and sender details are complete, accurate, and compliant with regulatory expectations.
	Maintain audit-ready logs of screening outcomes, approvals, and any override justifications


Bank Portal & System Management:


	Operate banking portals, treasury platforms, or core banking applications to initiate and authorize transfers within delegated limits.
	Validate and maintain counterparty bank details including SWIFT/BIC, IBAN, intermediary bank routing, and local clearing codes.
	Troubleshoot basic portal issues (e.g., failed logins, session timeouts, file upload errors) and escalate unresolved matters to IT or bank support.


Reconciliation & Record Keeping:


	Reconcile daily outgoing transfers against bank statements, transaction reports, and internal ledgers.
	Prepare end-of-day transfer logs, including total value processed, number of transactions, fees incurred, and pending items.
	Assist the finance and treasury teams in investigating unreconciled, aged, or returned transactions.
	Maintain organized, accessible digital files for all transfer instructions, approvals, and bank confirmations.


Reporting & Escalation:


	Provide daily, weekly, and monthly activity reports to the Team Lead or Treasury Manager, highlighting processing volumes, exceptions, and rejected transfers.
	Promptly escalate system errors, limit breaches, or compliance flags to senior officers.
	Document and report any operational gaps or recurring issues to support continuous improvement.


Qualifications and Experience


	A minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree in finance, Accounting, Banking & Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related disciplines.
	2 - 4 years of relevant experience in payment operations, fund transfer processing, treasury operations, or settlement roles within a bank, finance company, or corporate treasury department.
	Demonstrated experience in processing SWIFT payments, local clearing systems, and online banking portals.
	Familiarity with AML/CFT payment screening requirements and sanctions list checks.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (reconciliations, basic formulas, sorting/filtering) and payment file preparation.


Application Closing Date: 12th June, 2026.

Method of Application
